Book a Call

Our process

We work alongside your team to ship clear, production-ready documentation every sprint.

STEP 01

Project kickoff and planning

We start with a kickoff to align on scope, backlog, and release goals. A clear communication plan is set early. We also define tools and how documentation will be delivered each sprint.

STEP 02

Backlog review and task definition

We review the product backlog and audit existing documentation. Gaps and new requirements are identified. Tasks are defined, approved, and aligned with tools, source control, and delivery methods.

STEP 03

User analysis and doc= structure

We analyze user personas and product usage before writing. A clear structure and table of contents is created. Content is organized into concept, task, and reference types.

STEP 04

Templates and writing standards

We create templates aligned with your brand and focused on clarity. Writers follow docs-as-code and structured approaches. A style guide ensures consistency in tone, format, and terminology.

STEP 05

Collaboration and sprint execution

We work as part of your scrum team and join planning sessions. Documentation is created alongside development. Reviews are continuous and tasks are only complete when documentation is ready.

STEP 06

Review, approval, and publication

We review content, visuals, and links for accuracy and consistency. Documentation is presented during sprint reviews. Once approved, it is published and made available to users.

Documentation services for modern product teams.

Partner with us

Services

  • Developer & API documentation
  • Software documentation
  • Docs-as-code
  • Developer portals
